title: Hatsune Miku Vanilla Totem (64x)
description: Hatsune Miku Totem with default art style (64x Version).
body:
Miku totem that respects the default art style of minecraft.
This Version is based on the Faithful totem, check them out at [https://faithfulpack.net/](https://faithfulpack.net/)
.
